patch.value: GH-533: create/update accept empty --title — required-title contract inconsistent between omitted and empty string

pm create --type Task --title "" succeeds and persists an empty title, and pm update <id> --title "" clears an existing title, while omitting --title on create correctly errors 'Missing required option --title'. Title-less items render meaninglessly in lists and break title-keyed tooling (dedupe is title-prefix based). Fix: treat empty/whitespace-only --title as invalid on both create and update with the same required-option error shape; note extension.name already has a load-bearing .trim() precedent (PR#339–#351 era) — apply the same trim-then-require rule.
Empty or whitespace-only --title rejected on create and update; error shape matches the missing-required-option error; regression tests; GH-533 closed
